source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.

identity.name: Morphous Daffodil
identity.motif: yellow trumpet, white petals, leaf-green stem

typography: Inter Variable for clear learning-product hierarchy with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, steady progress states, and accessible dashboard numerals.
layout: 8px radii, 8pt spacing, petal-soft panels, pollen-grain texture, leaf-vein dividers, compact learning navigation, progress dashboards, and calm spring-garden surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent Daffodil motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Daffodil transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated daffodil trumpet motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A single spring daffodil bloom with a bright yellow trumpet corona, soft white petals, leaf-green stem and two slender leaves, accurate botanical form, crisp silhouette edges, natural petal veining, gentle pollen texture, and fresh optimistic spring garden character.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full trumpet, all white petals, stem, and leaves without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves yellow trumpet depth, white petal folds, leaf-green structure, and subtle natural texture.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for transparency removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no bouquet, no vase, no garden bed, no soil, no dew drops, no insects, no second flower, no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no decorative background.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Daffodil" derived from the visible daffodil trumpet cutout reference.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the daffodil image: yellow trumpet, white petals, leaf green stem/leaves, pollen texture, petal veins, and spring garden neutrals. The board must visibly respect only those motif-derived colors.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 4K-class composition, target 3840 x 2160.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable labels, generous grid spacing, and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title, motif story, palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
Typography: include English and Japanese type guidance for an optimistic learning system; use concise labels such as "Learn", "Module", "Progress", "検索", "学習", "完了".
UI language: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system for a learning dashboard, 8px radius cards and controls, petal-shaped soft panels, trumpet-yellow primary actions, leaf-green success/progress accents, white petal surfaces, warm garden-paper neutrals, crisp borders, subtle pollen-grain texture, petal-vein dividers, accessible contrast.
Components to show: buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, table rows, command palette/search, top navigation, sidebar navigation, progress cards, small charts, loading/empty/error status states, token chips.
Color constraints: use only yellow trumpet, white petals, leaf green, cream garden paper, pale straw, soft pollen gold, moss/leaf dark, and warm soil/seed neutrals. No generic purple or blue gradients, no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no random brand names, no watermark, no stock-photo look, no flower bouquet as the main content, no illegible microtext.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the "Morphous Daffodil" design-system board. It must feel like the same optimistic learning system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible daffodil cutout and visible light design-system board as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, component language, texture, spacing, 8px radii, typography, and learning-dashboard layout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 4K-class composition, target 3840 x 2160.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable labels, generous spacing, and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title, Dark Mode, palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
Visual details: dark background derived from deepest leaf green, moss, stem green, warm soil, and seed neutrals; foreground from white petal highlights; trumpet-yellow primary actions; pollen-gold focus rings; leaf-green progress/success states; warm cream separators; subtle petal vein and pollen grain textures; crisp shadcn/tweakcn-style cards and controls with 8px radius.
Components to show: buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, table rows, command palette/search, top navigation, sidebar navigation, progress cards, small charts, loading/empty/error status states, token chips.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples for product UI labels such as "Learn", "Module", "Progress", "検索", "学習", "完了".
Color constraints: use only yellow trumpet, white petal highlights, leaf/stem greens, moss green, cream garden neutrals, pollen gold, and warm soil/seed browns. No neon colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no pure flat black unless used as a minor deep neutral.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no random brand names, no watermark, no stock-photo look, no unrelated illustrations, no illegible microtext.
